# Siren

## Tags
police, ambulance, emergency, security, alert, alarm, light

## Categories
medical

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/siren)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Siren;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Siren { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
